definition: You Only Live Once. Used to justify doing something impulsive or risky.
example: I just booked a one-way ticket to Bali. YOLO!

definition: Term of endearment for a significant other. Supposedly stands for 'Before Anyone Else.'
example: Date night with bae tonight, can't wait.
origin: Internet slang / African American Vernacular English

definition: Looking perfect, flawlessly styled. Originally about eyebrows.
example: Her eyebrows are on fleek today.

definition: Someone who likes mainstream, unoriginal things. Think Ugg boots and pumpkin spice lattes.
example: She's so basic — she literally only listens to top 40.

definition: Being bitter, upset, or angry about something minor.
example: Don't be salty just because I beat you at Mario Kart.
origin: African American Vernacular English / internet culture

definition: Subtly disrespecting or showing contempt for someone.
example: Did she just throw shade at my outfit? I saw that look.

definition: Expression of being so overwhelmed (usually by something funny or ridiculous) that you can't form words.
example: He showed up in a onesie to the meeting. I can't even.

definition: Performing adult responsibilities like paying bills, cooking, or doing laundry — often reluctantly.
example: I did my taxes AND went grocery shopping. Adulting level: expert.

equivalents.genAlpha: No equivalent — Gen Alpha hasn't unlocked this yet

definition: Fear Of Missing Out. The anxiety that everyone else is having fun without you.
example: I'm getting major FOMO seeing everyone's Coachella stories.

definition: Suddenly cutting off all communication with someone without explanation.
example: We went on three great dates and then he ghosted me.

definition: Desperate for attention, especially romantic or sexual attention.
example: He liked all 47 of her photos in a row. So thirsty.

definition: Someone who speaks or acts boldly without caring about consequences. Often used as a compliment.
example: She told her boss to give her a raise or she'd quit. Savage.

definition: An aspirational term for the ideal friend group or group activity.
example: Look at them matching at brunch. Squad goals.

definition: Euphemism for hooking up. Inviting someone over under the pretense of watching Netflix.
example: He texted 'wanna Netflix and chill?' at midnight. We all know what that means.

definition: To Be Honest. Used to preface an honest opinion.
example: TBH, that movie was not worth the hype.

definition: As F***. Used as an intensifier at the end of a statement.
example: I'm tired AF after that workout.

definition: So amused or shocked that you've figuratively died from laughing.
example: Did you see that meme? I'm literally dead. 💀

definition: Something that's exciting, fun, or excellent. Originally meant intoxicated.
example: That party last night was lit!

definition: Being socially and politically aware, especially regarding issues of racial and social justice.
example: Stay woke — don't believe everything the media tells you.
origin: African American Vernacular English / Black Lives Matter movement

definition: Short for family. Used for close friends or anyone you feel connected to.
example: What's good, fam? We still on for tonight?

definition: Expression of disbelief, annoyance, or casual address. Evolution of 'bro.'
example: Bruh, you really just dropped your phone in the toilet?

definition: Secretly, subtly, or to a moderate degree. The opposite of 'highkey.'
example: I lowkey want to skip the party and just stay home.

definition: Short for relationship. To want two people to be in a romantic relationship.
example: I totally ship Jim and Pam from The Office.

definition: Evidence or proof, usually screenshots of texts or social media posts.
example: She said she never texted him? I have the receipts.
origin: Reality TV / social media drama culture

definition: A sharp, witty response to criticism or an insult.
example: Her clap back to that troll's comment was legendary.

definition: An enthusiastic yes, often drawn out for emphasis. Yaas queen!
example: Yaas queen, that outfit is everything!

definition: Looking really good, especially with a fierce outfit or body. The new 'on fleek.'
example: That dress has her looking snatched.

definition: Gossip or juicy information. 'Spill the tea' means share the gossip.
example: Girl, spill the tea! What happened at the party?

definition: Shocked, surprised, or emotionally affected.
example: I just found out they're dating. I'm shook.

definition: A major positive transformation in appearance, confidence, or life situation.
example: Have you seen her glow up since high school? Unrecognizable.

definition: A fake Instagram account where you post unfiltered, real content for close friends only.
example: I only post my real thoughts on my finsta.

definition: To reject or boycott someone (usually a public figure) for problematic behavior.
example: Twitter cancelled that influencer after those old tweets surfaced.

definition: An extremely devoted fan. Can be used as a verb (to stan) or noun.
example: I stan Beyoncé so hard. She can do no wrong.

definition: Over the top, dramatic, or excessive in behavior or style.
example: She brought a full charcuterie board to the movie theater. So extra.

definition: Assessing someone's mood or energy, or the atmosphere of a situation.
example: Vibe check — are we actually having fun or just pretending?

definition: To show off, especially wealth, possessions, or achievements.
example: He's always flexing his new car on Instagram. We get it, dude.

definition: To do something exceptionally well or look amazing.
example: She slayed that presentation. Standing ovation material.

definition: Emotionally upset or provoked by something, often used humorously for minor annoyances.
example: Someone put the milk in before the cereal. I'm triggered.
origin: Psychology term co-opted by internet culture

definition: Something aspirational. Added after a noun to express admiration.
example: Their relationship? Goals. Their house? Goals. Their dog? Also goals.

definition: Angry because you're hungry. A portmanteau of hungry + angry.
example: Don't talk to me right now, I'm hangry. Where's the Chipotle?
origin: Internet slang, added to Oxford Dictionary (2018)
